details.question: Write a summary of about 1000 to 1200 words. Only write about the plot and characters of the story.
details.reason: Agent预测严重偏离标准答案，主要人物姓名（如Deshaun Promise, Megan Deshaun, Daria）与标准答案（Hayden Briony, Lake Esmeralda, Naomi Logan）完全不符，核心情节（如‘Recalled to Life’信息、银行信使身份、医生父亲被发现）缺失或错误，属于主要人物错误和核心情节缺失。
